name: Metcash Limited
analysis: MTS's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 22% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$3.1700. Trade idea: entry A$3.2350, stop A$2.8809, target A$4.2973 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
